Models¶

Created on Tue Mar 24 11:21:12 2026

@author: jacpe396

class models.diffusion.SpectralNDE3D(config: Dict[str, Any])[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

3D Neutron Diffusion Equation solver using Spectral (FFT) methods.

This class implements the NDE \(\partial_t N = D\nabla^2 N + \rho N\) in Fourier space, providing high-precision numerical stability.

D¶

Diffusion coefficient in cm^2/s.

Type:

float

rho¶

Reactivity constant in 1/s.

Type:

float

k_sq¶

Pre-computed squared wave numbers.

Type:

np.ndarray

compute_rhs(t: float, N_flat: ndarray) → ndarray[source]¶

Calculates the time derivative dN/dt using a spectral Laplacian.

Parameters:

  • t – Current simulation time (s).

  • N_flat – Flattened 3D array of neutron densities.

Returns:

Flattened array of dN/dt values.

Return type:

np.ndarray

get_initial_condition()[source]¶

Must return the starting N distribution.

Created on Tue Mar 24 11:51:47 2026

@author: jacpe396

class models.base_model.BaseModel[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Interface for Neutron Diffusion Equation models.

All physics models (e.g., Linear, Spectral, MSR) must inherit from this class to ensure compatibility with the system solvers.

abstractmethod compute_rhs(t, N)[source]¶

Calculate the time derivative dN/dt.

abstractmethod get_initial_condition()[source]¶

Must return the starting N distribution.

neutronic_field_theory
